zh.Harley, Shropshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾哈爾
zh.Leominster, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾萊奧明斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Harley於大約1245年出生在英國賀福爾萊奧明斯特時，他的父親Sir Robert de Harley22歲，母親Alice de Pyvlesdon21歲。他於大約1280年與Burga de Willey結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾哈爾享年74歲。

zh-hans.Harley, Shropshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰史洛普爾哈爾
zh-hans.Leominster, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾萊奧明斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Harley于大约1245年出生在英国賀福爾萊奧明斯特时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Harley22岁，母亲Alice de Pyvlesdon21岁。他于大约1280年与Burga de Willey结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1318年在英国英格兰史洛普爾哈爾享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Harley (Shropshire, Yorkshire). The Shropshire placename derives from Old English hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Yorkshire placename derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ or hær + hlāw ‘mound, hill’, later replaced by lēah.

Irish (Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarghaile ‘descendant of Earghal’, a variant of the personal name Fearghal without the initial F-. This name has also become Herley and Hurley . Compare Arrell and Harrell .
Scottish (Fife): habitational name from any of several places called Harlaw in Midlothian, Peeblesshire, and Berwickshire, named in Older Scots with hare ‘gray’ + law ‘hill’.

variants.name: Herley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Art, Cormac.
Irish: variant of   Hurley  , probably via   Herlihy  .
English: variant of   Harley   or   Hurley  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Harley was born about 1245, in Leominster, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir Robert de Harley, was 22 and his mother, Alice de Pyvlesdon, was 21. He married Burga de Willey about 1280. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1318, in Harley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Harley est né environ 1245, à Leominster, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Harley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice de Pyvlesdon, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Burga de Willey environ 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1318, à Harley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Harley um 1245 in Leominster, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Harley 22 und seine Mutter Alice de Pyvlesdon 21. Er hat um 1280 Burga de Willey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1318 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Harley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Harley è nato il circa 1245 nel Leominster, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Harley, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Pyvlesdon, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Burga de Willey circa 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1318, nel Harley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Harleyが約1245年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアレオミンスターで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Harleyは22歳，母Alice de Pyvlesdonは21歳であった。約1280年にBurga de Willeyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1318年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアハーリーで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Harley(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 허퍼드실르 리민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Harley(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Pyvlesdon(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1280년 Burga de Willey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 하를리에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Harley nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Leominster, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Harley, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Pyvlesdon, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Burga de Willey aproximadamente 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1318, em Harley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Harley родился около 1245 г. в местности леоминстир, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Harley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Pyvlesdon, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Burga de Willey около 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1318 г. в местности харли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Harley nació aproximadamente 1245, en Leominster, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Harley, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice de Pyvlesdon, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Burga de Willey aproximadamente 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1318, en Harley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años.
